Name: ActionCardinalityBehavior
Title: ActionCardinalityBehavior
Description: Defines behavior for an action or a group for how many times that item may be repeated.

Name: ActionConditionKind
Title: ActionConditionKind
Description: Defines the kinds of conditions that can appear on actions.

Name: ActionGroupingBehavior
Title: ActionGroupingBehavior
Description: Defines organization behavior of a group.

Name: ActionParticipantRole
Title: Action participant role
Description: Either a practitioner role or a relationship type.

Name: ActionParticipantType
Title: ActionParticipantType
Description: The type of participant for the action.

Name: ActionPrecheckBehavior
Title: ActionPrecheckBehavior
Description: Defines selection frequency behavior for an action or group.

Name: ActionRelationshipType
Title: ActionRelationshipType
Description: Defines the types of relationships between actions.

Name: ActionRequiredBehavior
Title: ActionRequiredBehavior
Description: Defines expectations around whether an action or action group is required.

Name: ActionSelectionBehavior
Title: ActionSelectionBehavior
Description: Defines selection behavior of a group.

Name: ActionType
Title: ActionType
Description: The type of action to be performed.

Name: SNOMEDCTBodyStructures
Title: SNOMED CT Body Structures
Description: This value set includes all codes from [SNOMED CT](http://snomed.info/sct) where concept is-a 442083009 (Anatomical or acquired body site (body structure)).

Name: SNOMEDCTClinicalFindings
Title: SNOMED CT Clinical Findings
Description: This value set includes all the "Clinical finding" [SNOMED CT](http://snomed.info/sct) codes - concepts where concept is-a 404684003 (Clinical finding (finding)).

Name: Condition/Problem/DiagnosisCodes
Title: Condition/Problem/Diagnosis Codes
Description: Example value set for Condition/Problem/Diagnosis codes.

Name: DataAbsentReason
Title: DataAbsentReason
Description: Used to specify why the normally expected content of the data element is missing.

Name: DefinitionTopic
Title: DefinitionTopic
Description: High-level categorization of the definition, used for searching, sorting, and filtering.

Name: GoalCategory
Title: Goal category
Description: Example codes for grouping goals to use for filtering or presentation.

Name: GoalPriority
Title: Goal priority
Description: Indicates the level of importance associated with reaching or sustaining a goal.

Name: GoalStartEvent
Title: Goal start event
Description: Identifies types of events that might trigger the start of a goal.

Name: Jurisdiction ValueSet
Title: Jurisdiction
Description: This value set defines a base set of codes for country, country subdivision and region    for indicating where a resource is intended to be used.             Note: The codes for countries and country subdivisions are taken from    [ISO 3166](https://www.iso.org/iso-3166-country-codes.html)    while the codes for "supra-national" regions are from    [UN Standard country or area codes for statistical use (M49)](http://unstats.un.org/unsd/methods/m49/m49.htm).

Name: CommonLanguages
Title: Common Languages
Description: This value set includes common codes from BCP-47 (http://tools.ietf.org/html/bcp47)

Name: LibraryType
Title: LibraryType
Description: The type of knowledge asset this library contains.

Name: ObservationCategoryCodes
Title: Observation Category Codes
Description: Observation Category codes.

Name: LOINCCodes
Title: LOINC Codes
Description: This value set includes all LOINC codes

Name: ObservationInterpretationCodes
Title: Observation Interpretation Codes
Description: A categorical assessment, providing a rough qualitative interpretation of the observation value,    such as “normal”/ “abnormal”,”low” / “high”, “better” / “worse”, “susceptible” / “resistant”, “expected”/ “not expected”.    The value set is intended to be for ANY use where coded representation of an interpretation is needed.             Notes:          This is being communicated in v2.x in OBX-8 (Observation Interpretation), in v3 in ObservationInterpretation (CWE) in R1 (Representative Realm) and in FHIR in    Observation.interpretation. Historically these values come from the laboratory domain, and these codes are extensively    used. The value set binding is extensible, so codes outside the value set that are needed for interpretation concepts    (i.e. particular meanings) that are not included in the value set can be used, and these new codes may also be added to    the value set and published in a future version.

Name: ObservationMethods
Title: Observation Methods
Description: Observation Method codes from [SNOMED CT](http://snomed.info/sct) where concept is-a 272394005 (Technique (qualifier value)) or is-a 129264002 (Action (qualifier value)) or is-a 386053000 (Evaluation procedure(procedure))

Name: ObservationStatus
Title: ObservationStatus
Description: Codes providing the status of an observation.

Name: PlanDefinitionType
Title: PlanDefinitionType
Description: The type of PlanDefinition.

Name: PublicationStatus
Title: PublicationStatus
Description: The lifecycle status of an artifact.

Name: ObservationReferenceRangeAppliesToCodes
Title: Observation Reference Range Applies To Codes
Description: This value set defines a set of codes that can be used to indicate the particular target population the reference range applies to.

Name: ObservationReferenceRangeMeaningCodes
Title: Observation Reference Range Meaning Codes
Description: This value set defines a set of codes that can be used to indicate the meaning/use of a reference range for a particular target population.

Name: RequestIntent
Title: RequestIntent
Description: Codes indicating the degree of authority/intentionality associated with a request.

Name: RequestPriority
Title: Request priority
Description: The clinical priority of a diagnostic order.

Name: RequestStatus
Title: RequestStatus
Description: Codes identifying the lifecycle stage of a request.

Name: SubjectType
Title: Subject type
Description: Possible types of subjects.

Name: RegimenIntentVS
Title: Regimen Intent Value Set
Description: The clinical intent of an anti-cancer regimen. All codes are drawn from the SNOMED CT \"Intents (nature of procedure values)\" hierarchy (363675004).  **mCODE Migration Candidate** — Proposed for mCODE STU5.

Name: TreatmentLineVS
Title: Treatment Line Value Set
Description: Codes representing the ordinal line of systemic anti-cancer therapy. Used in LineOfTherapyObservation.valueCodeableConcept and the RegimenTreatmentLine extension.  **mCODE Migration Candidate** — Proposed for mCODE STU5.
